Notice Of Hearing On Verified Application And Application For An Order (1) Approving The Final Distribution Of Assets; (2) Discharging Th Insurance Commissioner As The Liquidator; And (3) Terminating These Proceedings; Declarations Of Michele Vass, Willard Roberts And Raymond Minehan In Support
Off Calendar Dec-22-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF INSURANCE COMMISSIONER-STATE OF CALIFORNIA (APPLICANT) Notice of Hearing on Verified Application and Application for an Order (1) Approving The Final Distribution of Assets; (2) Discharging The Insurance Commissioner as The Liquidator; and (3) Terminating These Proceedings. Appearances: Anne Michelle Burr, Deputy Atty. Gen. Dept. of Justice (415) 703-1403 appearing for Plaintiff and moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
